scripts.install:all: cd gateway && npm install && cd ../auth-ms && npm install && cd ../agent-ms && npm install
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n gateway,auth,agent -c blue,green,yellow "cd gateway && npm run dev" "cd auth-ms && npm run dev" "cd agent-ms && npm run dev"
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint:gateway && npm run lint:auth && npm run lint:agent
scripts.format:all: npm run format:gateway && npm run format:auth && npm run format:agent
scripts.run-dev-clean: npm run clean && npm run install:all && npm run dev:all
